parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return
parameters.name: .proplist

address.description: Host or network address from which the user is allowed to log in (A.B.C.D/M    (IP prefix))

group.description: Name of the group the user belongs to

inactivity-policy.description: Specifies inactivity action - logout (user will be logged out) or lockscreen (session will be locked, require password input to continue). Works only for CLI sessions.

inactivity-timeout.description: Specifies time after which user will be logged out or session will be locked. Minimal timeout - 1 minute, maximal timeout - 24 hours. Works only for CLI sessions. (1m..1d    (time interval))

name.description: The name of the user group (string value)

password.description: User password. If not specified, it is left blank (hit [Enter] when logging in). It conforms to standard Unix characteristics of passwords and may contain letters, digits, "*" and "_" symbols. (string value)
